summary: The page uses white text on light gray backgrounds (#dfe2e2, #d3bfb3) that fails WCAG AA contrast requirements for normal text, making content hard to read for low-vision and dyslexic users.

top_issues.title: Low contrast text on light backgrounds
top_issues.suggested_fix: Increase contrast by using darker text (e.g., #212529) or darker background (e.g., #0069f4) for body copy and secondary UI elements.

persona_notes.insight: Insufficient contrast reduces legibility; fixing to AA ensures text is perceivable.
Higher contrast reduces visual stress and improves reading fluency.
Clear contrast aids quick scanning on small screens, lowering bounce rates.
